home.title: PVC Windows Salamander & Aluminium Windows Alumil | Neofort Bucharest
home.description: Manufacturer of Salamander PVC windows and Alumil aluminium windows. Double glazing, professional installation, delivery across Europe. 20 years experience. Free quote!
home.hero_title: PVC & Aluminium Windows with Double Glazing
home.hero_subtitle: Neofort Thermoframes — Quality and commitment without compromise
home.products_subtitle: Neofort thermoframes are accompanied by complete services, certifications and approvals.
home.prod1_desc: We supply premium Aluminium and PVC windows from Salamander and Alumil brands, manufactured on automated production lines.
home.prod2_desc: We offer the most advanced insulation solutions: butyl tape, Blaugelb Triotherm+ pre-frames, anti-condensation foil for interior and exterior.
home.prod3_desc: We perform installations with highly experienced professionals. We guarantee the quality of window installations at any level of complexity.
home.prod4_desc: All accessories used are premium grade. Our windows are produced in one of the most modern thermoframe factories in Romania.
home.prod5_desc: We deliver our products throughout the European Community quickly and safely. We ensure professional packaging and palletizing for all product ranges.
home.steps_subtitle: Clarity in 3 simple steps. Our specialists will accompany you throughout the collaboration.
home.step1_desc: Contact and send a quote request via the contact form, email or phone & WhatsApp.
home.step2_desc: Establish configuration details and order composition. Schedule measurements.
home.step3_desc: Specify location details and delivery date, then carry out transport and installation.
home.why_desc: A choice can be simple with the right help. Our main priority is understanding the needs and requirements of the customer.
home.why1_desc: We constantly work on the quality-price-utility ratio and manage to come up with winning offers.
home.why2_desc: We always seek to bring the newest and most performant products and technical solutions to the market.
home.why3_desc: Our products and services have motivated over 50% of clients to return or recommend us.
home.why4_desc: For nearly two decades our name has been present in the PVC/Aluminium window market with growing results.

aluminiu.title: Aluminium Windows Alumil | Aluminium Doors | Neofort Bucharest
aluminiu.description: Premium Alumil aluminium windows: S77 Supreme, S67 Smartia, lift-and-slide S700 S350, folding SF85 M19800. Own production, delivery Europe. Free quote!
aluminiu.desc: Neofort offers complete supply services for Alumil Aluminium Windows. Our range includes systems for casement windows and doors, lift-and-slide and folding systems. Our windows meet nZEB energy efficiency requirements and passive house construction standards.

pvc.title: PVC Windows Salamander | Double Glazing Price | Neofort Bucharest
pvc.description: Salamander PVC windows BluEvolution 92 and GreenEvolution 76. Class A PVC profile, 6 chambers, Uw 0.70 W/m²K. Own production, installation, delivery Europe. Free quote!
pvc.desc: Neofort offers complete Salamander PVC Window supply services. Our range includes BluEvolution 92 and GreenEvolution 76, two next-generation window systems dedicated to nZEB energy efficiency solutions and passive house construction.

accesorii.title: Accessories PVC Aluminium Windows | Neofort Bucharest
accesorii.description: Premium window accessories: aluminium roller shutters, Raffstore venetian blinds, Blaugelb pre-frames, butyl tape, Saint Gobain glazing, Warm Edge spacers. Europe delivery.
accesorii.hero_subtitle: Premium accessories for aluminium & PVC windows
accesorii.desc: Neofort offers premium accessories that complement Salamander PVC and Alumil aluminium windows, all compliant with nZEB energy efficiency requirements.

servicii.title: Installation Services PVC Aluminium Windows | Neofort Bucharest
servicii.description: Complete installation services for PVC and aluminium windows. Free measurements, professional installation, transport, warranty. Bucharest and all Romania. Free quote!
